TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Hacining = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Hacining. 319 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 573 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 225 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 348 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku20%, Amis12%, Tayal5%, Puyuma1%, Kebalan1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Yaasa nniqun alang nii o, mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida phiyug kingal sduuy qsiya smalu sasaw samaw sapah na hangan hnang, mniq bukuy hngkwasan 1948(min-kwo37) do ga dha pryuhun hangan Kan-ceng, kika kndadax saw nii ka hangan alang nii. Nniqan alang Nuysan Skanki nsgan Ci-an alang Kan-ceng. Gasuc Gaga mniq kska yayung Mgluk. Ti-ri lnglingay Breenux ayug. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis, Tlu ni kari Klmukan. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeynskiyo. Pnyahan alang Pusu bi sjiqan eniq hini o kndadax dalih alang Nan-hwa na seejiq Amis, mniq hngkwasan 1981(min-kwo民國70) do tnhjil hini, kika mlutuc maa kingal bgurah alang. Pnyahan pnatas .2018.頁401.
S.PHON: = ħaʦiniŋ = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ ħaʦiniŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku**%, amis**%, tajal*%, pujuma*%, kəbalan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ jaasa nniqun alaŋ nii o, mniq saw mnɾmuxan tanaħ tunux siida pħijug kiŋal sduuj qsija smalu sasaw samaw sapaħ na ħaŋan ħnaŋ, mniq bukuj ħŋkwasan ****(min-kwo**) do ga dħa pɾjuħun ħaŋan kan-ʦəŋ, kika kndadax saw nii ka ħaŋan alaŋ nii. nniqan alaŋ nujsan skanki nsgan ʦi-an alaŋ kan-ʦəŋ. gasuʦ gaga mniq kska jajuŋ mgluk. ti-ɾi lŋliŋaj bɾəənux ajug. pusu kləgan səəɟiq nəalaŋ amis. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi amis, tlu ni kaɾi klmukan. snħijan ʦuŋ-ʦjaw pnɾħulan ɟoɾo ni təənskijo. pnjaħan alaŋ pusu bi sɟiqan əniq ħini o kndadax daliħ alaŋ nan-ħwa na səəɟiq amis, mniq ħŋkwasan ****(min-kwo****) do tnħɟil ħini, kika mlutuʦ maa kiŋal bguɾaħ alaŋ. pnjaħan pnatas .****.****.
S.FORM: = Hacining = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Ciansyang ka alang Hacining. 319 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 573 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 39% niqan 225 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 61% niqan 348 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku20%, Amis12%, Tayal5%, Puyuma1%, Kebalan1%, ni rahuq na o1%. Pusu nniqan alang Yaasa nniqun alang nii o, mniq saw mnrmuxan Tanah Tunux siida phiyug kingal sduuy qsiya smalu sasaw samaw sapah na hangan hnang, mniq bukuy hngkwasan 1948(min-kwo37) do ga dha pryuhun hangan Kan-ceng, kika kndadax saw nii ka hangan alang nii. Nniqan alang Nuysan Skanki nsgan Ci-an alang Kan-ceng. Gasuc Gaga mniq kska yayung Mgluk. Ti-ri lnglingay Breenux ayug. Pusu klegan seejiq nealang Amis. Djiyun kari Kari Amis, Tlu ni kari Klmukan. Snhiyan cung-cyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Teyeynskiyo. Pnyahan alang Pusu bi sjiqan eniq hini o kndadax dalih alang Nan-hwa na seejiq Amis, mniq hngkwasan 1981(min-kwo民國70) do tnhjil hini, kika mlutuc maa kingal bgurah alang. Pnyahan pnatas .2018.頁401.
S.PHON: = ħaʦiniŋ = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən ʦiansjaŋ ka alaŋ ħaʦiniŋ. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku**%, amis**%, tajal*%, pujuma*%, kəbalan*%, ni ɾaħuq na o*%. pusu nniqan alaŋ jaasa nniqun alaŋ nii o, mniq saw mnɾmuxan tanaħ tunux siida pħijug kiŋal sduuj qsija smalu sasaw samaw sapaħ na ħaŋan ħnaŋ, mniq bukuj ħŋkwasan ****(min-kwo**) do ga dħa pɾjuħun ħaŋan kan-ʦəŋ, kika kndadax saw nii ka ħaŋan alaŋ nii. nniqan alaŋ nujsan skanki nsgan ʦi-an alaŋ kan-ʦəŋ. gasuʦ gaga mniq kska jajuŋ mgluk. ti-ɾi lŋliŋaj bɾəənux ajug. pusu kləgan səəɟiq nəalaŋ amis. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi amis, tlu ni kaɾi klmukan. snħijan ʦuŋ-ʦjaw pnɾħulan ɟoɾo ni təənskijo. pnjaħan alaŋ pusu bi sɟiqan əniq ħini o kndadax daliħ alaŋ nan-ħwa na səəɟiq amis, mniq ħŋkwasan ****(min-kwo****) do tnħɟil ħini, kika mlutuʦ maa kiŋal bguɾaħ alaŋ. pnjaħan pnatas .****.****.
